problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
